name: Broccoli Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 ounces each) cream cheese, cubed
1 package Frozen chopped broccoli (10-ounces), cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until tender.
2. Add cream cheese and milk; stir over low heat until cheese is melted.
3. Dissolve bouillon in boiling water; add to cream cheese mixture.
4. Stir in broccoli, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
5. Heat thoroughly.
